creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
With patch fixed, a new failure occurs:

firefox-128.0_1,2:

/wrkdirs/usr/ports/www/firefox/work/firefox-128.0/gfx/skia/skia/src/core/SkCpu.cpp:98:32: error: no member named 'CRC32' in 'SkCpu'
   98 |             features |= SkCpu::CRC32;
      |                         ~~~~~~~^
1 error generated.

Full log:
http://freebsdrpi4.hopto.org/data/15aarch64-main/2024-07-04_20h24m40s/logs/errors/firefox-128.0_1,2.log

Any clues?
